_meta.principle: GitHub source code, issues, PRs, and project boards are the single source of truth. Every region must map to GitHub state. Internal docs / GTM artifacts / conceptual aggregations are NOT regions.

desc.en: End-to-end OAuth 2.0 / OIDC server with MFA, social login, DCR. Earlier wizard bug cluster (#629/#651/#653) closed; current open bugs (#683 callback URL, #694 Lark generic error, #695 account-mismatch redirect, #735 single OAuth service per provider) keep it from mature.
desc.zh: 完整 OAuth 2.0 / OIDC 服务端, 含 MFA / 社交登录 / DCR。早期 wizard bug 群 (#629/#651/#653) 已修, 当前未修 bug (#683 回调 URL / #694 Lark 通用错 / #695 账号错配跳转 / #735 单 provider 单 OAuth) 不满足 mature

desc.en: Authenticated reverse proxy that forwards agent requests to external APIs
desc.zh: 鉴权反向代理, 将 agent 请求转发到外部 API

desc.en: Auto credential injection — header / bearer / query / basic auth modes. Open follow-up #508 to unify HTTP and WebSocket injection under a single rule schema (from #493).
desc.zh: 向代理请求自动注入凭证, 支持 header / bearer / query / basic 四种模式。未修 follow-up #508 — 用统一规则 schema 合并 HTTP 与 WebSocket 注入 (来自 #493)

desc.en: nyxid node start — WebSocket reverse-connect node turns localhost into MCP Server
desc.zh: nyxid node start — WebSocket 反连轻量 node, 让本地服务变成 MCP Server

desc.en: nyxid ssh proxy — SSH-over-WebSocket tunneling. Heavy iteration (8 PRs in past 3 days), not 30d stable.
desc.zh: nyxid ssh proxy — SSH-over-WebSocket 穿透。近期高频迭代 (3 天 8 个 PR), 不满足 30 天稳定

desc.en: Production hosted NyxID. Earlier quickstart bug cluster (#640/#643/#644) closed; current attention shifted to CLI Wizard / OAuth surface (#695, #706, #711, #734) — still not 30d incident-free.
desc.zh: nyx.chrono-ai.fun 上的生产托管实例。早期 quickstart bug 群 (#640/#643/#644) 已修, 注意力转向 CLI Wizard / OAuth 面 (#695, #706, #711, #734), 仍不满足 30 天稳定

desc.en: REST API + OpenAPI spec + credentials auto-wrapped as MCP Server tools
desc.zh: REST API + OpenAPI spec + 凭证自动包装为 MCP Server 工具

label.zh: 托管实例快速上手 (< 10 分钟)

desc.en: docker run + 3 env vars one-liner for self-hosted private deployment
desc.zh: docker run + 3 个环境变量一行命令启动私有部署 (M1+)

desc.en: Invite-code registration + full org model: org-owned services (#534, #536), org-aware ACL, multi-admin nodes (#553), org avatars (#545), invite-code persistence through landing/login/register (#702). 30+ Org-tagged issues closed across W18–W19. Open #546 NyxID App org approval test.
desc.zh: 邀请码注册 + 完整组织模型: 组织拥有服务 (#534, #536), 组织感知 ACL, 多 admin 节点 (#553), 组织头像 (#545), 邀请码穿透 landing/login/register (#702)。W18-W19 关闭 30+ 个 Org 相关 issue。未修 #546 NyxID App 组织审批测试

desc.en: Public landing page (separate repo ChronoAIProject/nyxid-landing)
desc.zh: 公开落地页, 独立仓库 ChronoAIProject/nyxid-landing

desc.en: Aggregator: 10 activated external WAU by 2026-05-08, unlocks Show HN. Tracked on board ChronoAIProject #3.

label.zh: CLI 向导 (交互式 service add)

desc.en: nyxid service add interactive wizard covering OAuth / device-code / bearer / catalog flows. Heavy investment W18-W20 (10+ bugs closed, e.g. #429 #430 #441 #448 #449 #506 #565 #647 #648 #710). 5 open hardening bugs (#695 OAuth account-mismatch, #706 expired device-code, #710 WSL auto-open, #711 service-creation timeout, #713 cross-OS regression test).
desc.zh: nyxid service add 交互式向导, 覆盖 OAuth / device-code / bearer / catalog 流程。W18-W20 高频投入 (10+ bug 修复, 含 #429 #430 #441 #448 #449 #506 #565 #647 #648 #710)。5 个未修硬化 bug (#695 OAuth 账号错配 / #706 device-code 过期 / #710 WSL 自动打开 / #711 service 创建超时 / #713 跨 OS 回归测试)

desc.en: Information-architecture redesign of dashboard, key detail, and agent isolation flows. Open: #684 (first-time AI service flow), #685 (key detail page progressive IA), #686 (agent isolation guided flow). Closed W20: #687 dashboard nav exposing too much, #688 consistency + responsive standards.
desc.zh: Dashboard / Key 详情 / Agent 隔离流程的信息架构重做。未修: #684 (首次 AI service 流程), #685 (Key 详情页渐进式 IA), #686 (Agent 隔离引导流程)。W20 已修: #687 Dashboard 导航过载, #688 一致性 + 响应式标准

desc.en: Bidirectional device channels — DeviceAdapter + outbound transport (#411), and registering aevatar as a DownstreamService for Codex/Cursor inbound routing (#712). Extends NAT-Traversal beyond pure reverse-connect into full inbound/outbound bridging.
desc.zh: 双向设备 channel — DeviceAdapter + outbound transport (#411), 以及把 aevatar 注册为 DownstreamService 给 Codex/Cursor 入站路由 (#712)。把 NAT 穿透从纯反连扩到全双向桥接

desc.en: OAuth 2.0 Device Authorization Grant for headless / IoT / 1-tap device onboarding. Parent epic #736 + 11 sub-issues (#737 DB schema, #738-#740 endpoints, #741 web bind page, #742 CLI command, #743 rate limit, #744 notifications, #745 docs, #746 factory provisioning tool, #747 web QR provisioning). All seeded 2026-05-13 under label `device-code-grant`.
desc.zh: OAuth 2.0 Device Authorization Grant, 用于 headless / IoT / 1-tap 设备 onboarding。父 epic #736 + 11 个子 issue (#737 DB schema, #738-#740 endpoints, #741 web bind 页, #742 CLI 命令, #743 限流, #744 通知, #745 文档, #746 出厂烧录工具, #747 web QR provisioning)。2026-05-13 全量建立, 标签 `device-code-grant`

label.zh: NyxID M2 — Headless + 双向 + 跨产品

desc.en: Aggregator: M2 expansion beyond first-WAU. Adds device-code grant for headless/IoT, bidirectional channels for Codex/Cursor inbound, and cross-product skill install. Tracked on board ChronoAIProject #3.
desc.zh: 聚合节点: M2 在首批 WAU 之上扩展。新增 device-code (headless/IoT) / 双向 channel (Codex/Cursor 入站) / 跨产品 skill 安装。看板 ChronoAIProject #3

desc.en: Foundation refactor: convention freeze, architecture teardown, /api/v1 cut (breaking external contract), frontend modernization, ops/testing/observability. Refactor milestone fully closed (#64-#72, 8 issues).
desc.zh: 基座重构: 约定冻结, 架构拆解, /api/v1 切分 (对外契约 breaking), 前端现代化, 运维/测试/观测。Refactor milestone 已全 closed (#64-#72, 8 个 issue)

desc.en: Agent-facing API surface: search / pull / install / execute / build / upload / share. End-to-end lifecycle (#24), MCP-native discovery (#28), skill versioning + history (#25, #181, #183), sandboxed execution. M1 22/22 closed, shipped in v0.2.0.
desc.zh: 面向 agent 的 API 全面: 搜索/拉取/安装/执行/构建/上传/分享。端到端生命周期 (#24), MCP 原生发现 (#28), 版本化与历史 (#25, #181, #183), sandbox 执行。M1 22/22 closed, v0.2.0 上线

desc.en: Generate skills from OpenAPI specs (#41), from source repos (#42), generation wizard with reference selection (#45). TypeScript + Python SDK (#54, #110). M2 9/9 closed.
desc.zh: 从 OpenAPI spec 生成 skill (#41), 从源码仓库生成 (#42), 带参考引用的生成向导 (#45)。TypeScript + Python SDK (#54, #110)。M2 9/9 closed

desc.en: v0.5.0 marquee: single GitHub URL link + dry-run preview + manual sync (#234). Pull-from-GitHub baseline (#57) + frontend re-sync UI (#159).
desc.zh: v0.5.0 主打: 单一 GitHub URL link + dry-run 预览 + 手动 sync (#234)。GitHub pull 基础 (#57) + 前端 re-sync UI (#159)

desc.en: LLM-based quality & security audit (#32), waiver/justification flow (#33, #96), audit-as-label pivot — share is unconditional, audit is a label (#197). Per-version audit history (#181, #188). M3 31/32 closed; lone open #106 is NyxID permission cleanup.
desc.zh: 基于 LLM 的质量与安全审核 (#32), waiver/justification 流程 (#33, #96), audit-as-label 转向 — 分享无门槛, 审核作为标签 (#197)。Per-version 审核历史 (#181, #188)。M3 31/32 closed, 仅余 #106 NyxID 权限清理

Ornn-Audit-System.gh_query: is:issue is:open repo:ChronoAIProject/Ornn milestone:"M3 - Trust & Quality"

desc.en: Third-party security scan on every published skill: 225+ adversarial probes, six-stage detection pipeline, SARIF output. Differentiated GTM: 'every public Ornn skill is AgentSeal-scanned' (#253).
desc.zh: 对每个 public skill 跑第三方安全扫描: 225+ adversarial probes, 六阶段检测, SARIF 输出。差异化 GTM 卖点: 'every public Ornn skill is AgentSeal-scanned' (#253)

desc.en: PostHog-only platform analytics — DB-driven telemetry, custom audit infra removed (#271). Frontend pageview tracking + caller-type header with cookie-free consent (#246). Admin audit + analytics dashboard (#247). PostHog integration (#252).
desc.zh: 全站统一到 PostHog — DB 驱动遥测, 移除自家 audit 基础设施 (#271)。前端浏览追踪 + caller-type header + cookie-free consent (#246)。Admin 审核 + 分析 dashboard (#247)。PostHog 集成 (#252)

desc.en: Per-user playground / skill-gen quota with admin-granted beta credits (#250). Admin model selection from Chrono LLM catalog + per-call user picker (#251). Per-provider model management (#270). Quota redesign + admin panel restructure (#268).
desc.zh: per-user playground / skill-gen 配额 + admin 发 beta credits (#250)。Admin 从 Chrono LLM 目录选模型 + 调用时用户切换 (#251)。Per-provider 模型管理 (#270)。配额重做 + admin 面板重构 (#268)

desc.en: NyxID OAuth + service-registry + v0.4 breaking env-var split (SA vs OAuth user creds) + system-skills auto-generation from NyxID service catalog (#43, #44). Open bugs: #220 service slug mismatch, #218 share/audit leak, #106 permission catalog flip.
desc.zh: NyxID OAuth + service-registry + v0.4 breaking env 拆分 (SA 服务凭证 vs OAuth 用户凭证) + 从 NyxID 服务目录自动生成 system-skills (#43, #44)。未修 bug: #220 service slug 错位, #218 share/audit 泄漏, #106 权限 catalog flip

desc.en: ornn.chrono-ai.fun — developer touch-point for the agent API: skill detail, docs, admin, landing. NOT a marketplace (positioning #199). Editorial Forge UI migration Phases A-F (#201-#213), landing redesign (#221), Forge Workshop v3 (#232), full i18n zh/en parity (#343-#348).
desc.zh: ornn.chrono-ai.fun — agent API 的 developer 触点: skill 详情 + docs + admin + landing。不是 marketplace (定位见 #199)。Editorial Forge UI 迁移 A-F 阶段 (#201-#213), landing 重做 (#221), Forge Workshop v3 (#232), 全量 i18n zh/en 对等 (#343-#348)

desc.en: Q2 attack target: skills that compose into workflows. Skill chaining (#35), webhook & event system for skill lifecycle (#36), templates & starter kits (#37). 0 closed / 3 open — pre-implementation.
desc.zh: Q2 攻坚目标: 把 skill 组合成 workflow。Skill chaining (#35), webhook & event 系统 (#36), 模板 & starter kit (#37)。0 closed / 3 open, 尚未实现
